requests.objective: Audit q12/PWL native quality and measured PPA evidence to decide whether q12/PWL can proxy the qkv8_float_exact mixed/int8 frontier.

expected_result.reason: Existing q12/PWL PPA is measured but not a final qkv8_float_exact recost unless the q12/PWL quality gate passes and v8 composed PPA is available.

requested_items.objective: Audit q12/PWL quality and measured PPA evidence to decide whether the measured q12/PWL softmax datapath can proxy the qkv8_float_exact mixed/int8 frontier or requires v8 composed recost.
